scenes.vo: Pada suatu malam yang sunyi, seorang pemuda berjalan menyusuri gang sempit.
scenes.image_prompt: Wide shot of a young man walking through a narrow dimly-lit alley at night, cinematic lighting.
scenes.video_prompt: Camera slowly tracks forward as the young man walks down the narrow alley, dramatic shadows, mist on the ground.

scenes.vo: Tiba-tiba, ia mendengar suara aneh dari kejauhan.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of the young man's surprised face, looking off-camera, dramatic lighting.
scenes.video_prompt: Slow zoom-in on the young man's surprised face, eyes widening, slight head turn to look off-camera.

scenes.vo: Ia berjongkok, mencoba mengintip dari balik tembok.
scenes.image_prompt: Medium shot of the young man crouching behind a wall, peeking around the corner, tense posture.
scenes.video_prompt: Camera tilts down as the young man crouches, then slowly pans around the corner revealing a dark doorway.
